name: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious processes logging on with explicit credentials

False positives:
- Administrators that use the RunAS command or scheduled tasks

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4648 AND (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\cmd.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\powershell.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\pwsh.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\winrs.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\wmic.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\net.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\net1.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\reg.exe')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%localhost%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4648 AND (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\cmd.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\powershell.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\pwsh.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\winrs.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\wmic.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\net.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\net1.exe' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\reg.exe')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%localhost%' OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE '%$')))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
